SECTION_ESTUDIO_HINT_1: Welcome in. Come on in, don't just stand there.
SECTION_ESTUDIO_HINT_2: We're an indie studio from Madrid. We make games that connect with people.
SECTION_ESTUDIO_HINT_3: We come from YellowWorm, Athagon and other adventures. Now we're writing our own.
CTA_CARD_FREEJEFRY_DESC: Our first game. More info coming soon.
ESTUDIO_DETALLE_INTRO: We are three video game enthusiasts based in Madrid. Before BrainWorm we worked at studios like YellowWorm and Athagon, where we gained experience in design, art and programming. Now we bring our own ideas to life.
SECTION_FREEJEFRY_HINT: Our first game. More information coming soon.
FREEJEFRY_DETALLE_DESC: A game full of adventures. Stay tuned for future updates.
SECTION_DESARROLLO_HINT: We offer various development services. Click on each card for more information.
SECTION_CONTACTO_QUESTION: Would you like to get in touch with us?
